home.typing_text_0: EXPLORE THE WORLD OF ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
home.home_desc: Explore AI rankings, update the latest AI tools and news. 4AIVN shares practical knowledge to help you use AI more effectively in your daily work.
home.top_tools_desc: A curated list of the most popular and influential AI tools.
home.ai_assistance: Now you can work <primary>faster</primary> and <primary>more conveniently</primary> with the help of AI.
home.ai_assistance_desc: AI automates repetitive tasks, analyzes complex data, and provides insights to help you make better decisions and focus on what truly matters.
home.ai_agent: AI Agents will become increasingly easier to <primary>use</primary> and <primary>access</primary>.
home.ai_agent_desc: AI Agents are becoming more accessible to non-technical users and can utilize specific data and knowledge provided by users to support their work precisely as desired.
home.latest_news_desc: Stay updated with the latest AI advancements and discussions.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.section1Content: These Terms of Service govern your use of our website, 4AIVN. By accessing or using the service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
termsOfService.section2Content: You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, restrict or inhibit anyone else's use and enjoyment of the service. Prohibited behavior includes harassing or causing distress or inconvenience to any other user, transmitting obscene or offensive content, or disrupting the normal flow of dialogue within the service.
termsOfService.section3Content: To access certain features of the website, you may be required to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account information, including your password, and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
termsOfService.section4Content: We may terminate or suspend your access to our service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including but not limited to if you breach the Terms.
termsOfService.section5Content: In no event shall 4AIVN, nor its directors, employees, partners, agents, suppliers, or affiliates, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses.
termsOfService.section6Content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at: info@4aivn.vn.

aiTermsOfUse.title: AI Terms of Use
aiTermsOfUse.section1Content: By using the Artificial Intelligence (AI) features on 4AIVN (the "Service"), you agree to comply with these AI Terms of Use. These terms supplement our general Terms of Service.
aiTermsOfUse.section2Content: Our AI features are provided to assist and enhance your experience. You agree not to use these features for any of the following purposes:
aiTermsOfUse.section2Item1: Creating illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, harassing, or offensive content.
aiTermsOfUse.section2Item3: Deliberately creating misleading or deceptive information.
aiTermsOfUse.section2Item4: Violating the intellectual property rights of others.
aiTermsOfUse.section2Item5: Attempting to exploit, break, or bypass AI model safety measures.
aiTermsOfUse.section3Content: While we strive to ensure the accuracy and usefulness of AI-generated content, we cannot guarantee that it will always be perfect or error-free. You are responsible for reviewing and verifying any information provided by AI before relying on it for important decisions. 4AIVN is not responsible for any losses or damages arising from your use of AI-generated content.
aiTermsOfUse.section4Content: You retain ownership of the inputs (prompts) you provide to AI services. By providing inputs, you grant us a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to use, copy, and process such inputs for the purpose of providing and improving the Service.
aiTermsOfUse.section5Content: We may modify or terminate your access to AI features at any time, with or without notice, if we believe you have violated these terms.
aiTermsOfUse.section6Content: If you have any questions about these AI Terms of Use, please contact us at: info@4aivn.vn.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.section1Content: We collect information from you when you register on our website, log into your account, and/or when you log out. Information collected includes your name, email address, and in some cases, your profile picture.
privacyPolicy.section2Content: Any information we collect from you may be used to:
privacyPolicy.section2Item1: Personalize your experience and meet your individual needs.
privacyPolicy.section2Item3: Improve customer service and your support needs.
privacyPolicy.section3Content: We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information. We use advanced encryption to protect sensitive information transmitted online.
privacyPolicy.section4Content: We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal information to outside parties. This does not include trusted third parties who assist us in operating our website or conducting our business, so long as those parties agree to keep this information confidential.
privacyPolicy.section5Content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at: 4aivn@gmail.com.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.section1Content: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device by websites you visit. They are widely used to make websites work, or work more efficiently, as well as to provide information to the owners of the site.
cookiePolicy.section2Content: We use cookies to understand how you use our website and to improve your experience. This includes personalizing content and advertising. We use the following types of cookies:
cookiePolicy.section2Item1: Essential cookies: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems.
cookiePolicy.section2Item2: Performance cookies: These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site.
cookiePolicy.section2Item3: Functionality cookies: These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalization.
cookiePolicy.section2Item4: Third-party cookies: We may also use third-party cookies from services like Google Analytics to help us analyze website usage.
cookiePolicy.section3Content: Most web browsers allow some control of most cookies through the browser settings. To find out more about cookies, including how to see what cookies have been set, visit www.aboutcookies.org or www.allaboutcookies.org.
cookiePolicy.section4Content: We may update our Cookie Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Cookie Policy on this page.

about.metaDescription: Learn about 4AIVN - the mission, vision, and team behind Vietnam's leading AI tool exploration and ranking platform.
about.heroDesc: Your premier portal for artificial intelligence, helping you stay updated with the latest trends, tools, and AI applications worldwide.
about.missionDesc: Making AI knowledge accessible to everyone, helping individuals and businesses optimize their work performance through artificial intelligence.
about.communityDesc: Building a network of technology enthusiasts, a place to share experiences about AI models.
about.trustDesc: Providing objective and honest reviews of AI tools, helping users make the best choices.
about.service1Desc: Delivering the latest information about the AI market, technology deals, and future trends.
about.service2Desc: In-depth analysis of large language models (LLMs), computer vision, and the latest AI architectures.
about.service3Desc: Aggregating and categorizing AI tools for work, from design, programming to content creation.
about.service4Desc: Sharing information and ways to apply AI to real-world workflows.
